author: potuz
content: we need a shout-out channel in this server, every single day I want to give a shoutout to whomever built this tool  https://github.com/ethpandaops/panda, it's absolutely fucking incredible

author: cryptowolf0346
content:
This is really cool, especially the interactive breakdown of the new opcode behavior. The immediate calculator idea actually makes it way easier to see what’s going on step by step.

Might be nice to also have some visual debugging for stack changes per opcode, just to make it even easier to follow what’s happening. Looking forward to what you build next.

author: holgerd77
content: Thanks, great feedback, will pick up! 😊🙏
